verdict_reasoning: B4GALT1 is a type II membrane protein resident in the Golgi apparatus. The N-terminal signal sequence serves as a transmembrane domain that anchors the protein to the Golgi membrane, not the plasma membrane. This is an endomembrane-resident glycosyltransferase involved in intracellular glycoconjugate biosynthesis. While classified as 'membrane-bound', the Golgi localization is the defining feature of its biology, making it inaccessible to extracellular binders without cell lysis.
